ci_notes: CI requires PostgreSQL 15; uses DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost/stream_closed_captioner_phoenix_test. Tests cannot run in workflow without DB service. Elixir 1.16.0 / OTP 26.0.
testing_framework: ExUnit with ExMachina factories, Mox for external mocks (Azure.MockCognitive, Twitch.MockHelix, Twitch.MockExtension), DataCase for DB, ConnCase for controllers, ChannelCase for channels

testing_backlog.title: pipeline_to(:zoom) - untested
testing_backlog.detail: No Zoom mock - pipeline_to(:zoom) calls HTTPoison directly; needs Bypass or new behavior mock.

testing_backlog.title: Stream settings validation edge cases
testing_backlog.detail: Ecto changeset edge cases: invalid languages, extreme values.

testing_backlog.title: Twitch.get_live_streams/1 - blocked
testing_backlog.detail: Non-trivial chunk/sort/dedup logic but blocked by hardcoded OAuth HTTP in Twitch.Oauth.get_client_access_token/0 (uses HTTPoison.post! directly, no behavior). Would need production refactor.

maintainer_priorities: None noted yet - no maintainer comments on test-related issues.

completed_prs.description: Added 2 tests for untested branches in CaptionsPipeline.Translations.maybe_translate/3.
Added 3 tests for pipeline_to(:default): passthrough, pirate mode, profanity filter.
Revived captions_channel_test.exs with 5 tests: join auth, unauthorized join, active event, default pipeline, twitch pipeline.
Revived stream_settings_live_test.exs with 7 LiveView tests for CaptionSettingsLive.Index event handlers.
6 unit tests for Twitch.send_pubsub_message/2: nil channel_id guard, 204/400/500/502 responses, HTTPoison.Error. Uses existing Twitch.MockExtension Mox infra.

notes: Factory: insert(:bits_balance_debit, user: user) to create active debit. User factory has stream_settings: build(:stream_settings), bits_balance: build(:bits_balance) by default. translate_languages is has_many - pass as list in insert(:user, translate_languages: [...]). mix format/lint not runnable without Elixir installed in workflow runner. No Zoom mock - pipeline_to(:zoom) calls HTTPoison directly; would need Bypass or new behavior. CaptionsChannel: async: false required (channel subprocess makes DB calls through ChannelCase sandbox). Factory pattern to avoid duplicate stream_settings: insert(:stream_settings, user: build(:user, stream_settings: nil)). CaptionSettingsLive: update_stream_settings safe in tests (test users have provider=nil, no eventsub records, no Twitch calls triggered). render_hook(view, event_name, params) cleanly triggers handle_event without DOM selector issues. Twitch.get_live_streams untestable without refactor - Twitch.Oauth.get_client_access_token/0 uses HTTPoison.post! directly (no behavior mock). send_pubsub_message/2 uses ext_api_client() which returns Twitch.MockExtension in test env - fully testable.

monthly_activity_issue.note: PR #244 merged. New PR for twitch-send-pubsub-message-tests submitted 2026-03-11.
